content.text:
<analysis>
a. **Event type and context**: This is a pull request (#280) opened by cmungall reviewing a GO annotation analysis for gene NCGR_LOCUS67308 (a grass-specific SDH2-RPS14 fusion) from *Miscanthus lutarioriparius*. The PR adds a complete gene review with 9 new files including the AI review YAML, research notes, publications, and source data.

b. **Request type**: This is a request for **code review feedback** - the user wants me to review the pull request and provide feedback on code quality, best practices, potential bugs/issues, performance, security, and test coverage.

c. **Key information**:
   - 9 new files added (1421 additions, 0 deletions)
   - Main deliverable: `NCGR_LOCUS67308-ai-review.yaml` with 15 GO annotation reviews
   - Gene represents a unique SDH2-RPS14 fusion found in grasses
   - Includes deep research, notes, UniProt data, GOA annotations, and cached publications
   - All validation passes according to PR description

d. **Main tasks and challenges**:
   - Review the AI review YAML file for schema compliance and annotation quality
   - Check the gene notes and research files for accuracy and citations
   - Validate the GO annotation decisions against evidence
   - Ensure file structure follows project conventions
   - Check for any potential issues in data files

e. **Plan of action**:
   - Read CLAUDE.md to understand project guidelines
   - Examine the main review file (`NCGR_LOCUS67308-ai-review.yaml`)
   - Review supporting files (notes, research, publications)
   - Check data integrity of GOA and UniProt files
   - Validate against schema using project tools
   - Provide comprehensive feedback on annotation decisions and methodology

f. **Potential limitations**: I should be able to complete all review tasks as this involves reading and analyzing existing files rather than requiring special permissions.
</analysis>

input.body: ### PR Review in Progress I'm reviewing this pull request for the GO annotation analysis of NCGR_LOCUS67308 (SDH2-RPS14 fusion gene). #### Review Checklist: - [ ] Read project guidelines and understand review criteria - [ ] Examine main AI review YAML file for schema compliance - [ ] Review annotation decisions and supporting evidence - [ ] Check supporting documentation and research quality - [ ] Validate data file integrity - [ ] Assess overall code quality and best practices - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback Starting analysis... --- [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/24819608205)
